---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to contract logic, tooling, or docs
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What user/developer pain does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the desired behavior and constraints.

## Scope

- [ ] Contract behavior
- [ ] Bindings/API shape
- [ ] CI/release flow
- [ ] Documentation/governance

## Acceptance criteria

List verifiable criteria for completion.

## Additional context

Link related issues, specs, or prior implementation notes.
